name: Moist Supper Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Dr. Pepper, heated to boiling
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour hot Dr. Pepper over oatmeal and stir. Let stand 15 to 20 minutes.
2. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
3. In a large bowl, beat shortening with an electric mixer until smooth.
4. Gradually add granulated sugar and 1 cup brown sugar, beating well after each addition.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
6. Sift together flour, salt, baking soda, and nutmeg into another bowl.
7. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the shortening mixture, stirring until just combined.
8. Stir in the oatmeal mixture until fully incorporated.
9. Pour batter into a greased 9x9x2-inch pan.
10. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Remove from oven and mix together butter, remaining brown sugar, cream, and coconut.
12. Spread topping over the hot cake and place under broiler until bubbling and lightly browned.
Makes 12 servings. Per serving: Calories: 397 Fat: 19 g Cholesterol: 52 mg. Sodium: 250 mg. Percent calories from fat: 41 percent.
